n: Book 10, Chapter 1: The Champion of Angmar

steps.t: Laerdan has been given a room in the keep on the island of Tinnudir. His room is atop a flight of stairs on the right as you enter the keep. Calenglad…
Calenglad is at the Ranger-camp on the island of Tinnudir, in Evendim. Laerdan has written a letter to Calenglad explaining the threat Amarthiel poses…
